summary: Closed all-locale localized UI HIG readiness for scoped simulator surfaces. Preserved 152 repo-managed screenshots across 19 locales x 8 surfaces, updated the HIG matrix to 19/19 passed-scoped with zero open/in-progress findings, documented proof-level boundaries, and repaired the harness tests after the locale-aware navigation signature change.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17,OS=26.5 -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-hig-proof-clean-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.contract: All-locale Apple HIG localized UI closure
contract_status_changes.before: Native/fluent review was complete, but the HIG matrix had no final repo-managed all-locale proof closure and the final closure slice was blocked.
contract_status_changes.after: All 19 supported locales are hig-ui-reviewed for scoped simulator surfaces with matrix gate_state=passed-scoped, zero open findings, zero in-progress findings, and committed screenshot proof references.

contract_status_changes.before: Chat-provided German screenshots were recorded as observations only and could not close repo-managed HIG UI proof.
contract_status_changes.after: Repo-managed simulator screenshot proof is preserved; physical-device, TestFlight, and automated AX settled assertions remain explicit non-claims.

residual_risks: Physical-device HIG proof is still unclaimed for every locale.
TestFlight HIG proof is still unclaimed for every locale.

The 2026-05-18 closure screenshots used screenshot-only AX fallback because idb returned an application-only accessibility tree; maintained XCUITest accessibility regression covers Dynamic Type/touch-target checks separately.
The German evening-reflection trigger state was not force-captured; closure relies on source/key routing plus post-fix German screenshots for adjacent scoped surfaces.
Arabic Write directional swipe symbols are source-verified and Arabic Write/root-tab screenshots are preserved; the swipe action itself is not directly screenshot-captured.
recommended_next_reason: No eligible queued slice after closure; run the supervisor again when new work is added.
